description: Test cases where sources provide contradictory information

contexts: TechCorp was founded in 2005 by John Smith and Jane Doe in Silicon Valley, starting as a small consulting firm.
According to SEC filings, TechCorp was incorporated in 2008 and began operations the same year.
cases.description: Conflicting founding dates from different sources
cases.rationale: One source says 2005, another says 2008 - this is a factual contradiction that cannot be reconciled

cases.query: What is the recommended daily water intake?
contexts: Health experts recommend drinking at least 8 glasses (64 ounces) of water per day for optimal hydration.
Recent research published in the Journal of Medicine suggests that most people need only 4-6 glasses of water daily, as food provides significant hydration.
cases.rationale: Sources disagree on recommended amount - 8 glasses vs 4-6 glasses

contexts: Studies show coffee consumption is linked to reduced risk of type 2 diabetes, Parkinson's disease, and liver cancer. Moderate consumption (3-4 cups) appears beneficial.
Research indicates coffee can increase anxiety, disrupt sleep patterns, and raise blood pressure. Health organizations recommend limiting intake to 1 cup per day or avoiding it entirely.
cases.rationale: One source emphasizes benefits, another emphasizes risks - direct contradiction in recommendation

contexts: Email from Project Manager (Jan 5): The final deliverable is due on March 15th. No extensions will be granted.
Meeting notes from Jan 10: After discussion with stakeholders, the deadline has been moved to April 1st to accommodate additional requirements.
cases.description: Conflicting project deadlines from different communications
cases.rationale: Two different dates given (March 15 vs April 1) - context suggests timeline change but both appear authoritative

cases.query: What is the maximum file upload size?
contexts: API Documentation v2.1: Maximum file upload size is 10MB per file. Larger files must be split into chunks.
API Documentation v2.3: We've increased the maximum upload size to 50MB per file to support larger media files.
cases.description: Conflicting technical specifications from different doc versions
cases.rationale: Two documentation versions state different limits (10MB vs 50MB) - unclear which is current

cases.query: How many employees does the company have?
contexts: Our 2023 Annual Report states we employ 5,200 people across 12 global offices.
According to our LinkedIn company page updated this month, we have over 8,000 employees worldwide.
cases.description: Conflicting employee counts from official sources
cases.rationale: Significant discrepancy (5,200 vs 8,000) between two official company sources
